cardsLoadFailed: Could not load the card list.
claimErrGold: Not enough gold for this deck.
claimErrSave: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
confirmBody: This deck will be added to your collection and become your active deck. You can unlock and build other factions later.
decksFailedBody: Check your internet connection and try again.
decksFailedTitle: The decks could not be awakened

gate.continueWithout: Continue without downloading (missing files load while playing)
gate.doneSub: Cards and sounds now load instantly — even offline.
gate.onceNote: Downloaded once. You'll find video content later in ⚙️ Settings (“Everything + video”).
gate.prompt: For the game to run fast and work offline, cards and sounds need to be downloaded:
gate.title: Game content

ob.avatarSub: Your avatar represents you in battle. Unlock more later.
ob.deckSub: The cards will join your collection and become your first deck.

pickYourDeckSub: Your first deck shapes your start — but it won't limit your collection.

starter.noAvatars: No avatars yet — you can pick one later in the shop.
starter.pickAvatarSub: Your avatar represents you in battles. You can change it later in the shop.
starter.pickDeckSub: One starter deck — free. You'll learn to play with it in the tutorial battle.

playstyle.death: Necromancy — the graveyard is your weapon, creatures return.
playstyle.demons: Aggression and curses — flood the enemy deck with curses.
playstyle.east: Technique and tempo — precise damage at the right moment.
playstyle.inquisition: Control and armor — remove threats, punish spellcasting.
playstyle.light: Defense and healing — weather the pressure and win the long battle.
playstyle.mystic: Spells and combos — control the battle with powerful magic.
playstyle.thieves: Speed and gold — strike first and rob the enemy.
playstyle.vryhiok: A goblin swarm — fill the board with cheap creatures.

tutorial.alreadyRewarded: You replayed the lesson – the reward was already granted.
tutorial.errClaimed: You already own this deck – refresh the page.
tutorial.errNoGold: Not enough gold for this deck.
tutorial.subNoDeck: First claim your free starter deck — then you can play the guided tutorial battle.
tutorial.subWithDeck: One guided battle with your deck — you will learn every mechanic before facing a real starter deck.
tutorial.title: TUTORIAL
tutorial.wrongAction: Not the right action this time — follow the highlight.

welcome.sub: A starting gift for a new fighter
welcome.title: Welcome!
